hero.title: MULTIMEDIA ENGINEER
hero.name: Santiago Mejía Suárez
hero.text: Hi, I'm Santiago Mejía Suárez, a multimedia engineer who is passionate about technology and design.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.caficultorText: An educational virtual reality experience for Meta Quest that teaches the coffee process through immersive interactions in Unity.
projects.bankText: Web application with user authentication, secure registration, and session management using Node.js, MySQL, and bcrypt.
projects.modelText: Modeling, texturing, and rendering of a realistic gaming PC using Blender, Substance 3D Painter, and Cycles.
projects.fantaText: Branding project that included visual identity creation, graphic pieces, and an advertising spot for a conceptual brand.
projects.residentText: A 3D video game inspired by Resident Evil with enemy AI, puzzles, and classic mechanics developed in Unity.
projects.molassaultText: Narrative video game and logbook-style web platform developed at Nebuly Studios with Unity, web development, and AI tools.

about.title: About Me
about.text:
Passionate about developing interactive digital experiences, with a focus on XR technologies (Augmented, Virtual, and Mixed Reality), interactive design, and video game development. I have worked on virtual reality, web development, video game, and multimedia production projects, combining creativity and technology to create innovative solutions.

I have experience developing applications in Unity, designing UI/UX interfaces with Figma, 3D modeling and animation, web development, and using the Adobe suite. I focus on building immersive user-centered experiences, prioritizing usability, aesthetics, and functionality.
